body_txt: A hottie, usually in high school and usually male, whose first name is spelled t-r-o-u-b-l-e, often expressed through fondness for leather jackets and antisocial behavior. Has fangirls in both his own universe and the real one because All Girls Want Bad Boys . They may be revealed to have a heart of gold or a difficult home life . Ladettes and Femme Fatales also sometimes fit here. May even be a Misunderstood Loner with a Heart of Gold . Or simply have a Dark and Troubled Past and keep their troubles to themselves. See also: The Woobie , Broken Bird , Draco in Leather Pants , Evil Is Cool , Don't You Dare Pity Me! , Goths Have It Hard , Jerkass Woobie . Can overlap with Mr. Fanservice .
